task_completion.description: Update Maven compiler source and target to 17 in pom.xml
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or IDE showing the pom.xml file with <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source> and <maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target>.

task_completion.description: Replace java.util.Date and java.util.Calendar with java.time API
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing Employee.java, PayrollCalculator.java, ReportGenerator.java, or HrApplication.java with imports for java.time.* (e.g., LocalDate, LocalDateTime) and usage of these classes instead of Date or Calendar.

task_completion.description: Add generic type parameters to raw-type collections
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing EmployeeDirectory.java, PayrollCalculator.java, or ReportGenerator.java with parameterized collections (e.g., Map<String, Employee>, List<Employee>) instead of raw Map or List types.
A text editor showing EmployeeDirectory.java or ReportGenerator.java using StringBuilder instead of StringBuffer for string manipulation.

task_completion.description: Verify modernization by ensuring 'mvn clean test' passes
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the execution of the command 'mvn clean test' with a resulting 'BUILD SUCCESS' message and an indication that tests were run without failures.

integrity.description: Verify the agent modified the actual files in the workspace
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths in the editor or terminal commands should point to /home/ga/legacy-hr-system/src/main/java/com/example/hr/ or /home/ga/legacy-hr-system/pom.xml, not temporary files or just echoing code to the console.

integrity.description: Verify the Maven test execution is genuine
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal output for 'mvn clean test' should show standard Maven build logs, including the maven-compiler-plugin and maven-surefire-plugin execution steps, rather than a mocked or echoed 'BUILD SUCCESS' string.

integrity.description: Verify tests were actually executed and not skipped
integrity.visual_evidence: The Maven output should explicitly show 'Tests run: X, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0' where X is greater than 0. The agent must not use flags like -DskipTests.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The workspace is at /home/ga/legacy-hr-system. The original pom.xml has maven.compiler.source and target set to 8. Employee.java, PayrollCalculator.java, ReportGenerator.java, and HrApplication.java originally use java.util.Date and/or Calendar. EmployeeDirectory.java, PayrollCalculator.java, and ReportGenerator.java originally use raw List/Map types. EmployeeDirectory.java and ReportGenerator.java originally use StringBuffer. The agent must update all these to Java 17 standards (java.time, generics, StringBuilder) and successfully run 'mvn clean test'.
